title: Trial to Evaluate Cardiovascular and Other Long-term Outcomes with Semaglutide in Subjects with Type 2 Diabetes
exclusion_criteria: Personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma

primary_outcome.description: Time from randomization to first occurrence of cardiovascular death, non-fatal myocardial infarction, or non-fatal stroke
primary_outcome.timeframe: From randomization until end of study (approx. 104 weeks)

statistical_design.power: 90% power to detect a 15% reduction in risk

feasibility_assessment.recruitment_bottlenecks: Likely high due to restrictive cardiovascular risk requirements
feasibility_assessment.estimated_enrollment_rate: Subject to site availability and physician referral networks

arms.name: Placebo
arms.description: Once-weekly subcutaneous injection of matching placebo
